titleStmt.title: SII 30.87: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 87. (A.R. No. 164 of 1915.) Kīḻputtūr, Wandiwāsh Taluk, North Arcot District Svayambhunāthasvāmi temple-on the south, east and north walls of the same shrine and the maṇḍapa in front of it Vikrama-Chōḻa: year 5: 1123 A.D.

summary.p: This record which engraved in the fifth regnal year of the Chōḻa king Vikrama Chōḻadēva, is a copy of an earlier inscription dating back to the fourth regnal year of Vijayālayadēva. This document registers the detailed list of lands granted as dēvadāna to the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Tirukkumarīsvaramuḍaiyār at Irukkalāmputtūr in Poṉṉur-nāḍu, a subdivision of Veṇkuṉrak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam with their names as they are locally known and their proper measurements as follows: 1. Viḷakkupaṭṭi-500 kuḻi 2. Umainaṅgai-350 kuḻi 3. Nankuṟai-320 kuḻi 4. Māñcheṟu-300 kuḻi 5. Thaḻuvakkuḻaiñchāṉ-120 kuḻi 6. Tirumañjaṇakuṇḍu-100 kuḻi 7. Poṉpaḍukuṭṭam-240 kuḻi 8. Tirichchiṟṟambala-peruñjeṟu-300 kuḻi 9. Koḍaiyaṉcheṟu-400 kuḻi 10. Gaṇavathi kuṇḍu-40 kuḻi 11. Pūvilaik kuṇḍu-230 kuḻi 12. Chaṇḍēsvaran-160 kuḻi
The total extent of these lands was 3050 kuḻi and this grant was made for providing offering and worship like a6vibali and archaṉābhōgam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jeyamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟantu maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol niṟuttit ticaitoṟu vaḷarppa veṅkali nikki veyyaṟanRead- meyyaṟantaḻaippak kaliṅkameriyak kaṭāmalai naṭātti valaṅkolāḻi tiriya Orukuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasimhāsanattu tribhuvanamuḻutuṭai yāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarānaRead- paṉmarāna tribhuvanaccakkara vattikaḷ vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟakkoṭṭattu poṉṉūr nāṭṭu Irukkalāmputtūr Āḷuṭaiyārkku vijayālaiya tevaṟku nālāvatu kalveṭṭiṉpaṭi vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku Aiñcāvatu maṉnāyakanāṉa kaliṅkattaraiyaṉ pa kalveṭṭiṉpaṭi Eṭuttu tirukkaṟṟaḷi cātta kalveṭṭuvittapaṭi viḷakkuppaṭṭi kuḻi 5 100 Aiññūṟum Itan kiḻakku UmaiñaṅkaiRead- umainaṅkaikuḻi 3 100 5 10 muṉṉūṟṟa(ai)mpatum Itaṉ kiḻakku nankuṟai kuḻi 3 100 2 10 muṉṉūṟṟirupatum Itaṉ kiḻakku māñceṟu kuḻi 3 100 muṉṉūṟum Itankiḻakku taḻuvakkuḻaiñcāṉ kuḻi 100 2 10 nūṟṟirupatum vāykkālukku teṟku tirumañcaṇakuṇṭil kuḻi 100 nūṟum Itanmelai poṉpaṭu kuṭṭam kuḻi 2 100 4 10 Irunūṟṟu nāṟpatum Itan melai tiricciṟṟampala peruñceṟu kuḻi 3 100 muṉṉūṟum Itan melai koṭaiyaṉ ceṟu 4 100 nāṉūṟum Itanteṟku kaṇavati kuṇṭil 4 10 Itankiḻakku pūvilaikkuṇṭil taṭi Iraṇṭināl kuḻi 2 100 3 10 Irunūṟṟu muppatum Itan kiḻai caṇṭeśvaran kuḻi 100 6 10 nūṟṟaṟupatum Āka 3 1000 5 10 muvāyirattu Aimpatum Ivvū(r) rom ponnaṟak koṇṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkumariśvaramuṭaiyārkku tevatānamāka cey Oṉṟaraiye Araimā Avibeli Aṟcanābhogattukku Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 30.87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
